_comment: BitLife-style premade content (v0.24.2). Loaded at boot by index.html. A minimal FALLBACK_DATA copy is embedded in the HTML so the game still runs if this fetch fails. All effects are DELTAS applied through applyEffects() and clamped 0-100. Content names/premises/choices are modeled faithfully on BitLife by Candywriter (BitLife Fandom wiki); stat/salary numbers are balanced estimates (the original does not publish them).

lottery.label: Jackpot
lottery.desc: Won big at the casino or lottery.

tycoon.label: Tycoon
tycoon.desc: Grew a business to full staff.

tyrant.label: Tyrant
tyrant.desc: Ruled with the people against you.

bigamist.label: Many Loves
bigamist.desc: Married more than one person at once.

baby.text: You had a nasty ear infection and cried for days.
You got your first haircut. So grown up!
You babbled a full 'sentence' and everyone was impressed.
You said your first words! Your parents are overjoyed.
You were a fussy, colicky baby and cried all night.
You took your first wobbly steps across the living room.
Your family played peek-a-boo with you for hours.
Teething kept you (and everyone) up all night.
You let out your very first belly laugh.
You caught every bug going around daycare.
A nightly lullaby always soothed you to sleep.
Your family threw you a big first-birthday bash — cake everywhere!
Bath time turned into a giggly splash party.
Your grandparents spoiled you with gifts and cuddles.
You've grown attached to one special toy.
You won a crawling race against the neighbor's baby.

child.text: You lost a tooth and the tooth fairy left you a few bucks.
Your parents offer to send you to summer camp.
There's a school talent show.
Your parents offer an allowance for doing chores.
A bigger kid at school keeps shoving you and stealing your lunch.

choices.label: Fight back
choices.winText: You stood up to the bully and won the fight!
choices.loseText: The bully got the better of you.

child.text: There's a stray puppy outside. Can you keep it?

Friends are pressuring you to start vaping.

INSIDER_TIPS.text: Your cousin works at {co} and whispers that a huge buyout is announced next week.
Your aunt, a lawyer, lets slip that {co} is about to merge — the stock will spike.
A friend at an exchange says {co} is about to get a major listing.
A coworker leaks that {co}'s earnings will crush expectations.
